reason_for_decision: The article passes as a foundation piece because it explains FMCW and pulse radar in plain language while still preserving the real architectural differences that matter.
strengths: The article gives a clean beginner mental model for pulse versus FMCW without oversimplifying either one.
It is strong on debunking common beginner misunderstandings, especially around range and continuous-wave behavior.
The practical fit sections make the article more useful than a purely textbook explanation.
summary_assessment: This is a clear pass for a beginner-facing comparison. It is accessible, well organized, and technically careful enough to support later deeper articles.
